name: Jaguar Uranium Corp.
business: Jaguar Uranium is a uranium exploration and development company focused on uranium discoveries. Its portfolio consists of two uranium exploration projects in Argentina and one in Colombia. The company has not yet generated any revenue from operations.
sellsTo: electric utilities that buy uranium for nuclear power plants

exposures.sentence: Jaguar Uranium is a uranium exploration and development company focused on uranium discoveries.
The Berlin Project deposit contains battery commodities (vanadium, nickel and phosphate), uranium, REEs, molybdenum and zinc.
The Berlin Project deposit contains battery commodities (vanadium, nickel and phosphate), uranium, REEs, molybdenum and zinc.
The areas controlled by the Company are known to have uranium indications as well as rare earth metals and base metals, specifically copper in the Huemul Project.
We are a junior miner engaged in uranium exploration.

tamClaims.claim: Global supply and demand projections show a structural deficit averaging over 44 million pounds a year over the next 10 years.
tamClaims.sentence: Global supply and demand projections show a structural deficit between production and utility requirements averaging over 44 million pounds a year over the next 10 years and increasing thereafter, according to UxC.

tamClaims.claim: Industry sources estimate a uranium shortfall of roughly 55 million pounds over the next 18 months in an approximately 200 million pounds market.
tamClaims.sentence: As of July 2025, industry sources, including Uranium Producers of America as presented by Discovery Alert, estimate a uranium shortfall of roughly 55 million pounds over the next 18 months in approximately 200 million pounds market.

tamClaims.claim: Projections indicate a 1 billion-pound deficit over the next 15 years.
tamClaims.sentence: Looking ahead, according to the same source, projections indicate an even more concerning 1 billion-pound deficit over the next 15 years.
